text.title: Accessibility-First Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-tokens
step.action: Compute contrast for every plausible text/bg pair; mark pass/fail.

step.name: define-archetypes
step.action: Map each component to an ARIA archetype; reject ambiguous mappings.

step.name: bake-motion
step.action: Define reduced-motion variant per motion token.

step.name: annotate-system
step.action: Run a11y-annotation-pattern-library to attach role/name/state/keyboard/focus per archetype.

step.name: emit-spec
step.action: Render design-system a11y spec JSON + markdown.
step.decision-gate: If any color_pair pass=false or motion lacks variant, STOP.
